condition_context: {"classification_trigger": "30-day past-due bucket", "applies_to": "all exposures", "purpose": "prudential reporting classification"}
consequence: ADI must classify the exposure in the 30-day past-due bucket for prudential reporting purposes.

condition_context: {"classification_trigger": "60-day past-due bucket", "applies_to": "all exposures", "purpose": "prudential reporting classification"}
consequence: ADI must classify the exposure in the 60-day past-due bucket for prudential reporting purposes.

condition_context: {"classification_trigger": "90-day past-due bucket", "applies_to": "all exposures", "purpose": "prudential reporting classification"}
consequence: ADI must classify the exposure in the 90-day past-due bucket for prudential reporting purposes.

condition_context: {"applies_to": "all exposures subject to regular repayment schedule", "additional_condition": "total amount unpaid outside contractual arrangements is equivalent to at least 90 days worth of contractual payments"}
consequence: Exposure is classified as non-performing (in default); ADI must treat the borrower as having defaulted on the credit obligation.

condition_context: {"applies_to": "non-performing exposures (non-restructured)", "condition": "repayments made when due over continuous period", "additional_criteria": "borrower has no exposure 90 days or more past-due; borrower situation improved; exposure does not meet non-performing definition"}
consequence: ADI may reclassify the exposure from non-performing to performing once all criteria including this repayment period are met.

condition_context: {"applies_to": "restructured non-performing exposures", "condition": "repayments made in timely manner under revised contractual terms over continuous period", "additional_criteria": "borrower has no exposure 90 days or more past-due; borrower situation improved; exposure does not meet non-performing definition"}
consequence: ADI may reclassify a restructured non-performing exposure as performing once all criteria including this probation period are met.

condition_context: {"applies_to": "restructured exposures", "condition": "all payments made in timely manner under revised contractual terms", "starting_date": "scheduled start of payments under revised terms", "additional_criteria": "borrower has resolved financial difficulty"}
consequence: Restructured exposure may exit the restructured category once both exit criteria are met; new forbearance during probation restarts the probation period.

condition_context: {"applies_to": "standard property security valuations", "property_type": "standard properties"}
consequence: ADI must assume a marketing period of up to 12 months when determining fair value of property security.

condition_context: {"applies_to": "specialised or unusual property security valuations", "property_type": "specialised or unusual properties", "condition": "professional valuers advise that a longer period is appropriate"}
consequence: ADI may adopt a marketing period of up to 24 months when determining fair value of specialised or unusual property security where professional valuers advise this is appropriate.

condition_context: {"category": "Category One", "loan_type": "residential_secured", "mortgage_type": "registered first mortgage", "past_due_condition": "90 days or more past-due", "valuation_age": "not older than 12 months", "LMI": "partial or no LMI"}
consequence: Exposure qualifies as Category One (well-secured); no prescribed provisions are mandated.

condition_context: {"category": "Category Two", "loan_type": "residential_secured", "mortgage_type": "registered first mortgage", "LVR_net_of_LMI_range": "greater than 80% but no more than 100%", "past_due_condition": "90 days or more past-due", "valuation_age": "not older than 12 months", "term_of_payments_past_due": "90 days and less than 182 days"}
consequence: Minimum prescribed provision of 5% of outstanding balance must be held.

condition_context: {"category": "Category Two", "loan_type": "residential_secured", "mortgage_type": "registered first mortgage", "LVR_net_of_LMI_range": "greater than 80% but no more than 100%", "past_due_condition": "90 days or more past-due", "valuation_age": "not older than 12 months", "term_of_payments_past_due": "182 days and less than 273 days"}
consequence: Minimum prescribed provision of 10% of outstanding balance must be held.

condition_context: {"category": "Category Two", "loan_type": "residential_secured", "mortgage_type": "registered first mortgage", "LVR_net_of_LMI_range": "greater than 80% but no more than 100%", "past_due_condition": "90 days or more past-due", "valuation_age": "not older than 12 months", "term_of_payments_past_due": "273 days and less than 365 days"}
consequence: Minimum prescribed provision of 15% of outstanding balance must be held.

condition_context: {"category": "Category Two", "loan_type": "residential_secured", "mortgage_type": "registered first mortgage", "LVR_net_of_LMI_range": "greater than 80% but no more than 100%", "past_due_condition": "90 days or more past-due", "valuation_age": "not older than 12 months", "term_of_payments_past_due": "365 days and over"}
consequence: Minimum prescribed provision of 20% of outstanding balance must be held.

condition_context: {"category": "Category Three", "loan_type": "all", "description": "all exposures not in Categories One, Two or Four, including personal and commercial loans and residential mortgages with LVR net of LMI greater than 100%", "term_of_payments_past_due": "90 days and less than 182 days"}
consequence: Minimum prescribed provision of 40% of outstanding balance must be held.

condition_context: {"category": "Category Three", "loan_type": "all", "description": "all exposures not in Categories One, Two or Four, including personal and commercial loans and residential mortgages with LVR net of LMI greater than 100%", "term_of_payments_past_due": "182 days and less than 273 days"}
consequence: Minimum prescribed provision of 60% of outstanding balance must be held.

condition_context: {"category": "Category Three", "loan_type": "all", "description": "all exposures not in Categories One, Two or Four, including personal and commercial loans and residential mortgages with LVR net of LMI greater than 100%", "term_of_payments_past_due": "273 days and less than 365 days"}
consequence: Minimum prescribed provision of 80% of outstanding balance must be held.

condition_context: {"category": "Category Three", "loan_type": "all", "description": "all exposures not in Categories One, Two or Four, including personal and commercial loans and residential mortgages with LVR net of LMI greater than 100%", "term_of_payments_past_due": "365 days and over"}
consequence: Minimum prescribed provision of 100% of outstanding balance must be held.

condition_context: {"category": "Category Four", "loan_type": "all", "description": "overdrawn savings accounts and revolving exposures such as credit cards, overdrafts and lines of credit", "period_of_irregularity": "14 days and less than 90 days", "balance_basis": "full amount of credit drawn (except overdrawn savings accounts where only overdrawn amount applies)"}

condition_context: {"category": "Category Four", "loan_type": "all", "description": "overdrawn savings accounts and revolving exposures such as credit cards, overdrafts and lines of credit", "period_of_irregularity": "90 days and less than 182 days", "balance_basis": "full amount of credit drawn (except overdrawn savings accounts where only overdrawn amount applies)"}
consequence: Minimum prescribed provision of 75% of outstanding balance must be held.

consequence: Minimum prescribed provision of 100% of outstanding balance must be held.

condition_context: {"applies_to": "ADIs relying on a panel of approved valuation professionals", "condition": "panel review by ADI"}
consequence: The panel of approved valuation professionals must be reviewed at least annually by the ADI.
